message:
🐛 fix leaderboard rank — compute dynamically from level+score (#1512)

Rank was static in the data array and didn't match the actual sort
order (level desc → score desc). Now computed dynamically so rank
always reflects merit: highest level first, then highest score.
Removed stale rank field from static data and rank sort toggle.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,7 +12,6 @@ import { gtagEvent } from "../../../components/GoogleAnalytics";
 // ── Types ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
 interface AcmmProject {
-  rank: number;
   repo: string;
   level: number;
   score: number;
@@ -127,301 +126,301 @@ const BADGE_PARTICIPANTS = new Set([
 
 // ── Sort options ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
-type SortField = "rank" | "name" | "level" | "score";
+type SortField = "name" | "level" | "score";
 type SortDir = "asc" | "desc";
 
 // ── Project data (289 CNCF projects, snapshot 2026-04-22) ─────────────
 
 const ACMM_PROJECTS: AcmmProject[] = [
-  { rank: 1, repo: "kubestellar/console", level: 5, score: 20 },
